examples: And Noah begat three sons, Shem, Ham, and Japheth.
And Jared lived after he begat Enoch eight hundred years, and begat sons and daughters.
And Peleg lived after he begat Reu two hundred and nine years, and begat sons and daughters.
He was the man who launched Pixar, and Pixar begat Toy Story and Finding Nemo.
Patek Philippe's response was the sublime Nautilus, which begat a simpler model called the Aquanaut.
